scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./crust_hut/package.json')) { console.log('Installing crust_hut dependencies...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm install', {cwd: './crust_hut', stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.dev: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./crust_hut/package.json')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm run dev', {cwd: './crust_hut', stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { require('child_process').execSync('next dev', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.build: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./crust_hut/package.json')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm run build', {cwd: './crust_hut', stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { require('child_process').execSync('next build', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.start: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./crust_hut/package.json')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm run start', {cwd: './crust_hut', stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { require('child_process').execSync('next start', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.lint: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./crust_hut/package.json')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm run lint', {cwd: './crust_hut', stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { require('child_process').execSync('eslint', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
